test_steps: Open nvim with minimal-init, verify vim.g.loaded_focusmode == true
Verify :FocusmodeSetup command exists and prints warning
Source plugin file twice, verify no double-load errors
require('focusmode.config').setup({}) applies defaults
setup({focus_duration = 50}) overrides focus_duration to 50
setup({modes = {custom = {focus = 10, break = 2}}}) adds custom mode, preserves defaults
config.options.timer_ui.position equals 'top_right' with empty config
modes.get('pomodoro') returns {focus=25, break=5, long_break=15, long_break_interval=4}
modes.get('nonexistent') falls back to default mode settings
modes.list() returns all mode names including user-defined ones
modes.validate({focus=10}) returns false with missing fields error
Start a 3-second timer, verify on_tick fires with decreasing values (3,2,1)
Verify on_complete fires after countdown reaches 0
Call timer.pause() mid-countdown, verify ticks stop
Call timer.resume(), verify ticks resume from paused value
Call timer.stop(), verify is_running() returns false
Start timer twice without stopping, verify first timer is cleaned up
Headless nvim with timer start + stop exits cleanly within 5 seconds
persist.load() on fresh install creates default state
persist.record_session('pomodoro', 25, '14:00', '14:25') appends session
persist.save() then persist.load() round-trips correctly
Multiple sessions on same day updates daily_log sum correctly
3 consecutive days produces streak.current == 3
Gap day resets streak.current to 0 but preserves longest

features.description: Init module with setup() and commands
test_steps: require('focusmode').setup({}) registers all commands
:FocusStatus prints idle state
require('focusmode').status() returns table with phase='idle'
hl.setup() creates all highlight groups in namespace
Verify namespace isolation via nvim_get_hl(hl.ns, {name='FocusTimerText'})
ui.open_timer() creates floating window in top-right corner
Window is non-focusable (focusable=false in win config)
ui.update_timer({phase='focus', remaining=1500, mode='pomodoro', session=1, total_sessions=4}) shows '25:00'
ui.close_timer() removes window and buffer
Timer respects timer_ui.position config for all 4 corners
ui.show_toast('Focus complete!', 'focus_complete') creates toast window
Toast window is non-focusable
Toast auto-dismisses after toast.duration_ms
session.start('pomodoro') sets state to {phase='focus', mode='pomodoro'}
session.pause() pauses timer, state shows paused
session.resume() resumes timer
session.stop() returns to idle, timer stopped
session.skip() during focus jumps to break
session.get_state() returns expected fields
Configure blocked_keys, block() makes them no-ops
unblock() restores original mappings
is_blocking() returns correct state
dnd.enable() suppresses vim.notify calls
dnd.disable() restores vim.notify and flushes queue
dnd.is_active() returns correct state
Without achievement-tracker installed: award_xp() is no-op, no errors
earn_daily_achievement() is no-op without tracker, no errors
play_sound() with bell=true outputs terminal bell character
play_sound() with sound.enabled=false is no-op
play_sound() with sound.bell=true writes bell char
play_sound() with sound.command executes shell command
With auto_pause.on_focus_lost=true, FocusLost event pauses timer
FocusGained event resumes timer
With auto_pause.enabled=false, FocusLost does not pause
stats.today() returns correct minutes and session count
stats.streak() with consecutive days returns correct current/longest
stats.goal_progress() computes percentages correctly
stats.by_mode() returns per-mode breakdown
dashboard.open() creates centered floating window
Dashboard shows today, week, streaks, by-mode sections
Press q to close dashboard
dashboard.toggle() opens and closes
lualine_component() returns callable function
Function returns empty string when idle
Function is safe to call before setup()
goal_progress() returns daily_pct and weekly_pct
Toast shown when daily goal reached
VimLeavePre cleans up all timers
setup() twice is idempotent
Rapid toggle 10 times produces no orphaned windows or timers
Full headless session exits cleanly
